case_title: BORDUA, LEON VS HERSCHELLE, JEFF DBA JEFF HERSCHELLE ET CIE

docket_entries.description: DEFT TO RETURN RING TO PLTF WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE DATE OF MAILING OF THIS JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT IS WITH OUT PREJUDICE TO PLTF BRINGING ANOTHER ACTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BORDUA, LEON AS TO DEFENDANT HERSCHELLE, JEFF DBA JEFF HERSCHELLE ET CIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-29-1995, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-10-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORDUA, LEON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERSCHELLE, JEFF DBA JEFF HERSCHELLE ET CIE $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AGAINST DEFT IF THE RING DEFT RETURNS IS NOT THE SAME RING PLTF BROUGHT TO DEFT ON CONSIGNMENT OR IF THE RING IS DAMAGED OR ALTERED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERSCHELLE, JEFF DBA JEFF HERSCHELLE ET CIE
